title: Schematician's Goggles
description: The world becomes a contraption diagram with an in-world physics overlay, gated behind a wearable item. For Create: Aeronautics.
body:
This mod adds **Schematician's Goggles**, building off of Aviator's Goggles.

![Schematician's Goggles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19337cbaa7bb19dc4c3aced21365f23137bbc2c5.png)

While **Schematician's Goggles** are equipped:

- The world becomes a Contraption Diagram.
- Looking at any sublevel shows its **center of mass** and live **force vectors** (lift, drag, thrust, gravity, etc.).
- The Aviator Goggle HUD (stress, burner output, etc.) is preserved.
- The schematic view can be toggled by right-clicking with the item in-hand.

The recipe is simple enough, just an iteration on the Aviator's Goggles.

![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2c846422869913bf63485c7ca808f11de662380.png)
